content: Observing Daylight Saving Time would have a relatively small effect on how light it is during the workday in areas at high latitudes. This is because the days are already quite long or short at these latitudes, depending on the time of year, and the one-hour shift would not significantly alter the overall daylight pattern.
raw_content: Observing Daylight Saving Time would have a relatively small effect on how light it is during the workday in areas at high latitudes. This is because the days are already quite long or short at these latitudes, depending on the time of year, and the one-hour shift would not significantly alter the overall daylight pattern.
